title: Free monday Workflows webinar!
excerpt:

Join us on November 28th 16:00 CET for a deep dive into monday Workflows by Xebia’s monday.com master…

posts.author: larslodewijckx (Lars Lodewijckx)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can get things done with monday Workflows that you can’t with monday.com’s standard automations and integrations.

Join us on November 28th 16:00 CET for a deep dive into monday Workflows by Xebia’s monday.com master Freek van de Griendt. Register here:
monday.com Workflows Webinar | Nov 28, 2024

See ya there🫡

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! we would be happy to add this event to our community calendar! Please fill out this form for us to add!

posts.author: larslodewijckx (Lars Lodewijckx)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Juliette, that would be great! Can you send me a link?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Ooops! Here it is! Add a community event to our calendar

posts.cookedHtml: Thanks a lot I just filled in the form
